intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文电影线记忆：买 pub、要卖、说闹鬼、夜里怪声、早上门被堵家具被挪、五个 whisky 空瓶、两种 must have done 推断、最后白送也不要。读的时候保持轻微神秘和喜剧感，不要读成恐怖故事。

sentences.text: A public house which was recently bought by Mr. Ian Thompson is up for sale.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：Ian Thompson 先生最近买的小酒馆现在要出售。public house 不是公共房子，而是 British pub；up for sale 要连起来读。

sentences.text: Mr. Thompson is going to sell it because it is haunted.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他要卖掉它，因为他说那里闹鬼。haunted 是“被认为有鬼出没”，语气轻一点，不要恐怖化。

sentences.text: He told me that he could not go to sleep one night because he heard a strange noise coming from the bar.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：有天夜里他睡不着，因为听到 bar 里传来怪声。could not go to sleep 和 a strange noise coming from the bar 要分块。

sentences.text: The next morning, he found that the doors had been blocked by chairs and the furniture had been moved.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：第二天早上，门被椅子堵住，家具被移动。had been blocked 和 had been moved 是现场证据里的被动语态。

sentences.text: Though Mr. Thompson had turned the lights off before he went to bed, they were on in the morning.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：虽然睡前关了灯，但早上灯亮着。Though 后面先让步，再读出 they were on in the morning 这个反常结果。

sentences.text: He also said that he had found five empty whisky bottles which the ghost must have drunk the night before.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他发现五个空 whisky 瓶子，认为鬼前一晚一定喝了。must have drunk 是对过去的强推断，不是“必须喝”。

sentences.text: When I suggested that some villagers must have come in for a free drink, Mr. Thompson shook his head.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：叙述者提出另一种解释：村民一定进来喝免费酒了，Thompson 摇头。suggested that 和 must have come in 要读成推断。

sentences.text: The villagers have told him that they will not accept the pub even if he gives it away.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：村民说，即使白送也不要。accept 和 even if he gives it away 是最后笑点，要读出轻微荒唐感。
